member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to enable auto-scrolling when the item is dragged outside the top and bottom bound regions (for vertical orientation) or left and right bound regions (for horizontal orientation) of the .

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController
member.summary: It contains Drag and Drop related operations.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.DragXPosition
member.summary: Stores the value of dragXPosition.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.DragYPosition
member.summary: Stores the value of dragYPosition.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.startItemIndex
member.summary: It's used to indicates the start drag item index when dragging is started.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.endItemIndex
member.summary: It's used to indicates the end drag item index being dragging. And the item is reordered after dropped by using this index.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.previousItemIndex
member.summary: It's used to indicates that previous item index when after layout while perform dragging. The layout is perform while dragging using this index.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.initialYPosition
member.summary: It's used to indicates that initial position drag item for vertical orientation. By using this index, drag position will calculated while perform dragging.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.initialXPosition
member.summary: It's used to indicates that initial position drag item for horizontal orientation. By using this index, drag position will calculated while perform dragging.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.isInLayout
member.summary: It's used to indicates that whether item is in layout or not. Since when perform the drag and drop faster, layout will happened animated and that time the dragging will ended. So by using this flag it will hold until layout completed.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.isMovingUpOrLeft
member.summary: It's used to indicates that dragging direction for find next item index. By using this index, find the next or previous item and layout it.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.actualRect
member.summary: It's used to store the actual drag item rectangle value. It will used to reset the drag item if drop cancelled or drop in the same position.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.items
member.summary: It's used to hold the display items. Based on these collection find the previous or next item and layout it while perform dragging.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.dragItemSize
member.summary: It's used to store the drag line size and used to reset the size when auto scrolling is completed. Then only the actual drag item will be moved into dropped position.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.needtoStopDragging
member.summary: It's used to indicates whether item is in dragging or not and to reset the drag end after layout is completed. Since drag item is in layout while perform drag and drop faster.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.dropPosition
member.summary: It's used to hold the drop item position. Since while drag and drop faster the layout will happened even drag stopped. So until layout completed, we have hold the drop and then call the dropping after complete. So for that we need to maintain the position. Store the drop position in dragging until drop since if we calculate the position in renderer it will return last layout position from view even if we dropped in out of view. It will update in drag start also since we have to pass the drag start position if not dragging while drop the item.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.raiseConstantValue
member.summary: Used to see the visual changes when started dragging.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.DragDropController.previousYPosition
member.summary: it stores the previous Y position of the drag item.

member.summary: Automatically executes the load more command when the 's underlying collection is empty or end of the list is reached on scrolling.

member.summary: Displays the load more button when end of the list is reached and executes the load more command when the button is tapped.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.AutoFitMode
member.summary: Defines the AutoFit mode for .

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.AutoFitMode.None
member.summary: Considers the value of and layout the items.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.AutoFitMode.Height
member.summary: AutoFits the item based on its content. When layout, consider the height of an item.
member.remarks: For horizontal , consider the width of the item. For , after AutoFit all items in a row, it will take the maximum item height in that row and applies to all other items in the row.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.AutoFitMode.DynamicHeight
member.summary: AutoFits the item based on its content and update the layout of if the content's height or width is changed at runtime.
member.remarks: For horizontal , considers the width of the item. For , after AutoFit all items in a row, it will take the maximum item height in that row and applies to all other items in the row.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.CanAutoOnScroll
member.summary: Need to skip the execution of LoadMoreCommand when list view is initially loaded when AutoOnScroll load more option is enabled. (i.e., It will becomes true, once UI interaction happens with the list view.) If LoadMoreOption is changed to AutoOnScroll at run time, CanAutoOnScroll will be set as false. Otherwise, it will be true.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.SwipeStarting
member.summary: Occurs when the user starts to swipe an item in control.
member.remarks: The event can be canceled by handling the event and setting the property to true. If the event is canceled, the swiping action will not be triggered.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.Swiping
member.summary: Occurs when an item in the is being swiped.
member.remarks: The event can be handled by setting the property to true which holds the current swipe offset value for the swiped item until the event is raised.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.SwipeEnded
member.summary: Occurs when a swipe action is completed for an item in the .

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.SwipeReset
member.summary: Occurs when the swiped item in the gets reset to its original position.
member.remarks: The swipe reset action can be canceled by setting the to true.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemTapped
member.summary: Occurs when an item is tapped.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemRightTapped
member.summary: Occurs when an item is right tapped.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemDoubleTapped
member.summary: Occurs when an item is double tapped.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemLongPress
member.summary: Occurs when an item is long pressed.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemAppearing
member.summary: Occurs when the visual representation of a is being added to the .
member.remarks: The event is raised when the items are appearing in the view on scrolling, loading, and navigating from one page to another page.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemDisappearing
member.summary: Occurs when the visual representation of a is being removed from the .
member.remarks: The event is raised when the items disappearing in the view on scrolling, disposing, and navigating from one page to another page.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.SelectionChanged
member.summary: Occurs once the selection process has been completed for selected item in .

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.SelectionChanging
member.summary: Occurs when selecting an item at the execution time.
member.remarks: The event is a cancelable event and can be canceled by handling the event and setting the Cancel property to true. However, if the event is canceled, the selection process for the selected gets cancelled.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.GroupExpanding
member.summary: Occurs when a group is being expanded.
member.remarks: The event is a cancelable event and can be canceled by handling the event and setting the Cancel property to true. However, if the event is canceled, the group expanding process for the tapped gets cancelled. Also, we can customize the group being expanded through event argument.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.GroupCollapsing
member.summary: Occurs when a group is being collapsed.
member.remarks: The event is a cancelable event and can be canceled by handling the event and setting the Cancel property to true. However, if the event is canceled, the group collapsing process for the tapped gets cancelled. Also, we can customize the group being collapsed through event argument.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.GroupExpanded
member.summary: Occurs when a group is expanded.
member.remarks: This event occurs after the event if that event is not canceled.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.GroupCollapsed
member.summary: Occurs when a group is collapsed.
member.remarks: This event occurs after the event if that event is not canceled.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.QueryItemSize
member.summary: Occurs whenever an item comes into view and query the item size.
member.remarks: We can define whether the specified size can be set to the item or not by handling the event. When the Handled property in the argument is false, the decided size will not be set to the item.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ScrollStateChanged
member.summary: Occurs when the 's scrolling state changed.
member.remarks: This event only works with Android API level 23 and above.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.Loaded
member.summary: Occurs when a is loaded for the first time.
member.remarks: This event occurs only once when a is loaded in view for the first time. Any properties set in this event call back will lead to an additional refresh call when the is loaded.

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemDragging
member.summary: This event is triggered during the item drag and drop operation and indicates the drag action through the .

member.name: E:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.Scrolling
member.summary: This event is triggered during scrolling.

member.summary: Add and remove the scrolling event.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ShowItemBorder
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the border around each is visible.
member.value: true if the border is visible; otherwise, false. The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemBorderThickness
member.summary: Gets or sets the thickness of the border.
member.remarks: If the border thickness is not equal on all sides, the property will not be applicable.
member.value: Default value is 2.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.EnableFadeOnScroll
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether fade animation is enabled during scrolling.
member.value: The default value is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemBorderColor
member.summary: Gets or sets the border color of the .
member.value: The default color is #CAC4D0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemBorderRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the corner radius of the border.
member.value: Default radius is 0, which means sharp corners.
member.remarks: If the is not equal on all sides, then is not applied.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemBorderMargin
member.summary: Gets or sets the border margin of the .
member.value: Default value is 4,2,4,2.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.SwipeOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the value which specifies the distance that a swiped item will be moved to the side and stay there when it is swiped.
member.value: The default value is 100.
member.example:
To set the SwipeOffset property.
<syncfusion:SfListView x:Name="listView" ItemsSource="{Binding contactsinfo}" AllowSwiping="True" SwipeOffset="60"> </syncfusion:SfListView>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.SwipeThreshold
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that determines the distance at which a swipe view is considered as stuck or completed when exceeds the half of the value.
member.value: The default value is 40.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfListView x:Name="listView" ItemsSource="{Binding contactsinfo}" AllowSwiping="True" SwipeOffset="60" SwipeThreshold="30"> </syncfusion:SfListView>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.AllowSwiping
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the user can swipe items in the ListView to reveal actions.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfListView x:Name="listView" ItemsSource="{Binding contactsinfo}" AllowSwiping="True"> </syncfusion:SfListView>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.StartSwipeTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template that is shown when a user swipes an item in the SfListView to Left in vertical orientation or Up in horizontal orientation.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfListView x:Name="listView" ItemsSource="{Binding contactsinfo}" AllowSwiping="True"> <syncfusion:SfListView.StartSwipeTemplate> <DataTemplate x:Name="StartSwipeTemplate"> <Grid> <Grid BackgroundColor = "#009EDA" HorizontalOptions="Fill" VerticalOptions="Fill" Grid.Column="0"> <Grid VerticalOptions = "Center" HorizontalOptions="Center"> <Image Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row= "0" BackgroundColor= "Transparent" HeightRequest= "35" WidthRequest= "35" Source= "Favorites.png" /> </Grid> </Grid> </Grid> </DataTemplate> </syncfusion:SfListView.StartSwipeTemplate> </syncfusion:SfListView>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.EndSwipeTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the template that is shown when a user swipes an item in the SfListView to Right in vertical orientation or Down in horizontal orientation.

example.code: <syncfusion:SfListView x:Name="listView" ItemsSource="{Binding contactsinfo}" AllowSwiping="True"> <syncfusion:SfListView.EndSwipeTemplate> <DataTemplate x:Name="EndSwipeTemplate"> <Grid> <Grid BackgroundColor = "#009EDA" HorizontalOptions="Fill" VerticalOptions="Fill" Grid.Column="0"> <Grid VerticalOptions = "Center" HorizontalOptions="Center"> <Image Grid.Column="0" Grid.Row= "0" BackgroundColor= "Transparent" HeightRequest= "35" WidthRequest= "35" Source= "Delete.png"/> </Grid> </Grid> </Grid> </DataTemplate> </syncfusion:SfListView.EndSwipeTemplate> </syncfusion:SfListView>

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.LoadMoreOption
member.summary:
Gets or sets the option which determines the behavior of load more items. If it is , load more support will not be enabled. This is the default value.
If it is , automatically execute the when list view reaches the scroll end.
If it is , displays load more button when end reached and execute the when tap on button. For , is not supported. For , is not supported.

example.code: SfListView listView = new SfListView(); listView.LoadMoreOption = LoadMoreOption.Manual;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.LoadMorePosition
member.summary:
Gets or sets the position which determines where the load more item should be positioned. If it is , load more item will be added on the top of the list.
If it is and , the load more item will be in the left corner of the list. If it is , the load more item will be added at the bottom of the list. This is the default value.
If it is and , the load more item will be in the right corner of the list.

example.code: SfListView listView = new SfListView(); listView.LoadMorePosition = LoadMorePosition.Start;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.IsLazyLoading
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether list view is busy in loading more items. If it is true, the load more indicators will be displayed until it sets to false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.GroupHeaderTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets the for the group headers of .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.IsStickyHeader
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to display the sticky header or scrollable header.

example.code: SfListView listView = new SfListView(); listView.IsStickyHeader = true;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.IsStickyFooter
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to display the sticky footer or scrollable footer.

example.code: SfListView listView = new SfListView(); listView.IsStickyFooter = true;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.StickyFooterPosition
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to display the sticky footer inside the body of the ListView when items are less than the body size.

example.code: SfListView listView = new SfListView(); listView.StickyFooterPosition = FooterPosition.Body;

member.remarks: This API is applicable when is enabled. If the value is 'Default', it will be placed at the end of the ListView and if the value is 'Body', it will be placed inside the body of the ListView when items are less than the body size.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.IsStickyGroupHeader
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to display the sticky group header or scrollable group header.

example.code: SfListView listView = new SfListView(); listView.IsStickyGroupHeader = true;

member.remarks: If true and is 'Height' or 'DynamicHeight', sticky group header panning experience will not be smooth or item's layout won't work as expected. You can enable smooth experience, Set same size for all group header items by handling the event.

member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to allow expanding and collapsing of groups for .
member.value: true If allow expand and collapse groups; otherwise, false.

example.code: SfListView listView = new SfListView(); listView.AllowGroupExpandCollapse = true;

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.IsScrollingEnabled
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the scrolling is enabled or disabled for listview.
member.remarks: if is false then ListView will be rendering all its content with full height. Therefore, listView content will not be viewable without external ScrollView if they have content to be loaded that exceeds view size. if is true then ListView will make its content appropriate to View Size and reuse the items during the scrolling process.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemsSourceChangeCachingStrategy
member.summary: Gets or sets the caching strategies of data templates when re-using listview items.
member.value: The default value is where binding contexts of data template object get updated and re-used changing at runtime. The data templates objects that are selected by a are cached by the data template type and re-used.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.CachingStrategy
member.summary: Gets or sets the caching strategies of data template when re-using listview items.
member.value: The default value is where that data templates get re-used while data object associated with listview item gets changed. While scrolling binding contexts of data template object get updated and re-used. The data templates objects that are selected by a are cached by the data template type and re-used.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ItemGenerator
member.summary: Gets or sets the ItemGenerator to create or update a .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.ScrollBarVisibility
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether a vertical (in orientation) or horizontal (in Orientation) scroll bar should be displayed.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView.SfListView.DragItemTemplate

example.code: <?xml version = "1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?> <ContentPage xmlns = "http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui" xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml" x:Class="ListViewMaui.MainPage" xmlns:local="clr-namespace:ListViewMaui" xmlns:ListView="clr-namespace:Syncfusion.Maui.ListView;assembly=Syncfusion.Maui.ListView"> <ContentPage.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </ContentPage.BindingContext> <ContentPage.Content> <ListView:SfListView x:Name="listView" ItemsSource="{Binding Info}" DragStartMode="OnHold"> <ListView:SfListView.DragItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <Grid> <Label Text = "{Binding Name}" FontSize="15"/> </Grid> </DataTemplate> </ListView:SfListView.DragItemTemplate> </ListView:SfListView> </ContentPage.Content> </ContentPage>
